summary: Completed comprehensive testing of POS management system including backend APIs, admin dashboard, product management, warehouse management, online shop frontend, and shopping cart functionality. System shows excellent integration between backend and frontend with 96.6% API success rate.

minor_bugs.issue: Online order creation fails with '商品库存不足' when main warehouse has insufficient inventory
minor_bugs.impact: Expected behavior - system correctly prevents overselling

working_endpoints: /api/purchase-orders - Purchase order creation and receiving working

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation to online orders management page fails to load

missing_features.issue: Shopping cart works but full checkout form/process not implemented
missing_features.impact: Users can add items to cart but cannot complete purchase through UI

working_features: Online shop product display with headquarters inventory
Shopping cart - add to cart functionality working
Real-time integration between admin and shop

passed_tests: Purchase order creation and receiving (入库)
Online shop product display with real inventory

high_priority: Implement complete checkout process in online shop - add checkout form with shipping details and order submission
medium_priority: Fix navigation to online orders management page in admin
Add inventory to main warehouse to enable online order testing
low_priority: Consider adding more detailed error handling for inventory insufficient scenarios
